agentBoard.github.owner.description: Default GitHub repository owner (user or organization). Used when not specified in .agent-board/config.json. If empty, the GitHub SSO account name is used as fallback.

agentBoard.github.repo.description: Default GitHub repository name. Used when not specified in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.jsonProvider.path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to a JSON file containing tasks for the JSON provider. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.markdownProvider.inboxPath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the inbox directory containing .md task files. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.markdownProvider.donePath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the directory where done .md files are moved. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.beadsProvider.executable.description: Path to the Beads CLI executable. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.worktree.enabled.description: Create an isolated git worktree for providers that support it (e.g. Copilot CLI). Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.copilotCli.yolo.description: Enable /yolo mode for Copilot CLI — auto-approve all changes without confirmation. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json under genAiProviders.copilot-cli.yolo.

agentBoard.copilotCli.fleet.description: Enable /fleet mode for Copilot CLI — optimise prompt for parallel fleet execution. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json under genAiProviders.copilot-cli.fleet.

agentBoard.kanban.columns.description: Ordered list of Kanban column identifiers. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.pollInterval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for providers that use polling (e.g. Beads). Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.copilotModel.description: Preferred Copilot model family for the LM API provider (e.g. 'gpt-4o'). Leave empty to use the default model.

agentBoard.sessionTimeoutMinutes.description: Maximum time in minutes an agent session may run before auto-kill. Set to 0 to disable. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.contextDepth.description: How much context to inject into the agent prompt. 'minimal' = task only, 'standard' = task + workspace, 'full' = + file tree + git. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.postAgentSummaryToIssue.description: Post a summary comment on the GitHub issue when an agent session completes.

agentBoard.autoCleanWorktreeOnDone.description: Automatically remove the git worktree when a session completes successfully.

agentBoard.logLevel.description: Log level for the Agent Board output channel. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.maxSessions.description: Maximum number of parallel agent sessions launched by the squad feature. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.sourceColumn.description: Column from which the squad picks tasks to launch. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.activeColumn.description: Column tasks are moved to when the agent starts working. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.doneColumn.description: Column tasks are moved to when the agent completes. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.autoSquadInterval.description: Auto-squad polling interval in milliseconds. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.maxRetries.description: Maximum retries for a failed squad session. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.priorityLabels.description: Ordered list of labels used to prioritise tasks. Tasks matching an earlier label are launched first. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.sessionTimeout.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a session may run before being timed out. Set to 0 to disable. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.cooldownMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between consecutive session launches. Prevents rate-limiting. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.excludeLabels.description: Labels that cause a task to be skipped by the squad. Case-insensitive. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.squad.assigneeFilter.description: Only launch tasks matching this assignee. Empty = all, '*' = any assignee, 'unassigned' = no assignee, or exact username. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.notifications.taskActive.description: Show a VS Code notification when a task is automatically moved to the active column. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

agentBoard.notifications.taskDone.description: Show a VS Code notification when a task is automatically moved to the done column. Overridable in .agent-board/config.json.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile:tsc && npm run lint
scripts.test: mocha out/test/suite/taskStore.test.js out/test/suite/agentManager.test.js out/test/suite/providerRegistry.test.js out/test/suite/columnId.test.js out/test/suite/aggregatorProvider.test.js out/test/suite/schema.test.js out/test/suite/contextBuilder.test.js out/test/suite/messages.test.js out/test/suite/projectConfig.test.js out/test/suite/githubProvider.test.js out/test/suite/genAiProvider.test.js out/test/suite/worktreeManager.test.js out/test/suite/squadManager.test.js out/test/suite/agentDiscovery.test.js out/test/suite/mcpToolHandler.test.js out/test/suite/errorUtils.test.js out/test/suite/sessionStateManager.test.js out/test/suite/markdownProvider.test.js --ui tdd --reporter spec
